hero.title: See Every
hero.description:
Real-time Pose Detection · Variable Speed Scrub · Precise Clip Editing
Turn your training footage into your most powerful coach

items.title: Real-time Pose Detection
items.description: Accurately identifies 18 body joints and overlays a skeleton on your video in real time. High-confidence bounding box markers included.

items.title: Precise Clip Editing
items.description: Set IN / OUT points to quickly extract key moments and export clips. Optionally burn the skeleton overlay directly into the exported video.

items.title: Variable Speed Scrub
items.description: One finger controls the timeline: scrub left and right to seek, drag up and down to change speed. Four steps — 1×, ½×, ¼×, ⅛× — to catch every critical moment.

items.title: Multi-function Player
items.description: Skeleton overlay · 6-speed slow motion · Pinch zoom up to 4×

comingSoon.label: COMING SOON
comingSoon.title: Baseball Swing Analysis
comingSoon.description: AI-powered swing trajectory detection and release angle analysis — coming soon
